fixer_base)
LParen
RParenc
FixParenTa
        atom< ('[' | '(')
            (listmaker< any
                comp_for<
                    'for' NAME 'in'
                    target=testlist_safe< any (',' any)+ [',']
                     >
                    [any]
                >
            >
            |
            testlist_gexp< any
                comp_for<
                    'for' NAME 'in'
                    target=testlist_safe< any (',' any)+ [',']
                     >
                    [any]
                >
            >)
        (']' | ')') >
    c
target
